seoTitle: Murray vs Murray Upper — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murray and Murray Upper. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Murray vs Murray Upper: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murray and Murray Upper.
heading: Murray vs Murray Upper — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murray, Queensland and Murray Upper, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Upper has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Murray (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murray or Murray Upper safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murray has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Murray Upper scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murray scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Murray Upper scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murray or Murray Upper?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Upper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
